commits.author: vertz-tech-lead[bot]
commits.message: fix(infra): add quality-gates command to pre-push hook (infra-002)

commits.author: vertz-dev-core[bot]
commits.message: fix(ui-compiler): transform JSX in conditional branches, remove .node access

grade.summary: Critical scope violation: PR claims to implement ui-033 diagnostic rules but actually contains two unrelated bug fixes (infra-002 + JSX conditional transform). Missing changeset for package changes. Work is functional but process violations are severe.

testBeforeImpl.evidence: Cannot verify test-first order without session transcript. Tests exist and are comprehensive (188 lines across 2 test files).

redGreenCycle.evidence: No transcript available to verify red-green-refactor cycle.

qualityGates.evidence: No transcript available to verify 'bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run lint' was run before commits.

noSkips.evidence: Code review shows no @ts-ignore, as any, .skip, or --no-verify in changed files.

testQuality.evidence: Tests verify behavior from outside, not implementation details. Multiple edge cases covered. Test names are descriptive.

changeset.evidence: PR modifies packages/integration-tests/package.json (added yaml dep), packages/ui-compiler/src/transformers/*, and packages/ui/src/dom/conditional.ts but includes NO changeset. Rule: 'Changeset required for any package change'.

branchNaming.evidence: Branch 'feat/ui-033-compiler-diagnostics' claims to implement ticket ui-033 (5 diagnostic rules), but PR actually contains infra-002 (lefthook fix) and an unrelated JSX bug fix. Branch name is misleading.

atomicCommits.evidence: Two commits, each addressing one logical change: (1) lefthook config, (2) JSX conditional transform.

botScripts.evidence: Both commits use bot Git identities: vertz-tech-lead[bot] and vertz-dev-core[bot].

conventionalCommits.evidence: Both commits follow conventional format: 'fix(infra): ...' and 'fix(ui-compiler): ...'

ticketScope.evidence: Ticket ui-033 requires implementing 5 diagnostic rules (lifecycle-scope, untransformed-jsx, missing-cleanup, raw-dom-mutation, signal-outside-component). PR #259 implements NONE of these. Actual diagnostic implementation exists as commit d800177 on separate branch 'pr-258' and was never merged.

readDesignDoc.evidence: No session transcript to verify, but scope violation suggests design doc was not followed. Ticket ui-033 clearly specifies 5 diagnostic rules; PR delivers infra fix + JSX bug fix instead.

noScopeCreep.evidence: PR bundles two unrelated fixes (infra-002 lefthook + JSX conditional bug) under ui-033 feature branch. Rule: 'Never refactor unrelated code. Stay in scope.'

filesMatchScope.evidence: Ticket ui-033 specifies files: packages/ui-compiler/src/diagnostics/*.ts. PR modifies: lefthook.yml, packages/integration-tests/*, packages/ui-compiler/src/transformers/*, packages/ui/src/dom/*. Complete mismatch.

developerWalkthrough.evidence: PR title claims 'feat/ui 033' but no Developer Walkthrough included. Mitigation: actual changes are bug fixes (not features), so walkthrough may not be required.

examples.evidence: No examples demonstrating the fixes. Lefthook change lacks usage documentation.

documentation.evidence: No documentation updates for lefthook configuration changes.

testComprehensiveness.evidence: Tests cover multiple edge cases: parenthesized JSX, ternary branches, multi-level conditionals, .node property access bug.

noEval.evidence: No eval() or new Function() in changed files.

noHardcodedSecrets.evidence: No hardcoded credentials or tokens in diff.

inputSanitization.evidence: Not applicable - changes are test infrastructure and compiler internals, no user input handling.

violations.description: PR #259 title claims to implement 'feat/ui 033 compiler diagnostics' but does not implement any of the 5 diagnostic rules from ticket ui-033
violations.evidence: Ticket ui-033 acceptance criteria: '[ ] lifecycle-scope rule detects bare onCleanup() and onMount() calls', '[ ] untransformed-jsx rule detects JSX the compiler skipped', etc. PR contains: (1) lefthook config fix for infra-002, (2) JSX conditional transform bug fix. Diagnostic implementation (commit d800177) exists on separate branch and was never merged.
violations.recommendation: 1. Close or rename PR #259 - it does not match its title. 2. Update ticket ui-033 status to 'Todo' - diagnostic rules were never merged. 3. Create NEW PR from commit d800177 that actually implements ui-033. 4. Review session transcript to understand why scope was violated.

violations.description: PR bundles two unrelated fixes (infra-002 + JSX bug) under ui-033 feature branch
violations.evidence: Commit fc14d12: 'fix(infra): add quality-gates command to pre-push hook (infra-002)' from vertz-tech-lead[bot]. Commit 1d425f6: 'fix(ui-compiler): transform JSX in conditional branches' from vertz-dev-core[bot]. Neither relates to ui-033 diagnostic rules.
violations.recommendation: Split unrelated work into separate PRs. Rule: 'Never refactor unrelated code. Stay in scope.' Each ticket should get its own branch and PR.

violations.evidence: Modified: packages/integration-tests/package.json (added yaml@^2.3.0 dep), packages/ui-compiler/src/transformers/*.ts, packages/ui/src/dom/conditional.ts. No changeset file in .changeset/ for these changes.
violations.recommendation: Add changeset with type 'patch' for @vertz/ui-compiler and @vertz/ui bug fixes. Run: npx changeset add

violations.description: Branch name 'feat/ui-033-compiler-diagnostics' does not match actual work delivered
violations.evidence: Branch implies feature work on diagnostic rules. Actual work: infrastructure fix (infra-002) + compiler bug fix (no ticket). This creates false expectations for reviewers and stakeholders.
violations.recommendation: Use accurate branch names that match ticket scope. If scope changes mid-development, create a new branch or escalate to VP Eng.

violations.description: JSX bug fix commit references 'Bug #255' in test descriptions but has no associated ticket
violations.evidence: Test file jsx-conditional-nested.test.ts line 28: 'describe('JsxTransformer — conditional branch JSX (Bug #255)')'. Bug #255 was a previous PR, not a ticket. Current fix has no ticket of its own.
violations.recommendation: All bug fixes should have tickets (even if Tier 1 critical). Create retroactive ticket for JSX conditional transform bug or reference the correct ticket if one exists.

notes: Session transcript unavailable - TDD order and quality gate execution could not be verified
PR title is false advertising - creates confusion about what was delivered
Actual ui-033 diagnostic implementation exists as orphaned commit d800177 on branch 'pr-258'
Work quality is good (tests are comprehensive, bugs are fixed), but process violations are severe
Two different bots contributed to the same 'feature' branch (tech-lead + core) suggesting coordination issue
